message:
fix(web): add center parameter to useSequenceGrid scrollToPosition

The hook's scrollToPosition wrapper was not forwarding the optional
center parameter to the renderer, causing TypeScript errors when
callers passed center=false.

Updated signature from (position: number) to (position: number, center?: boolean)
to match the renderer's signature.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
